visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man, Tim, stands outdoors in a bright, sunny environment with large glass-walled buildings of a tech campus in the background. He is dressed in a light green t-shirt and a dark grey flat cap, frequently gesturing with his hands as he addresses the camera. His facial expressions are animated and friendly, with frequent smiles and direct eye contact. (2) The scene shifts to a series of close-up shots focusing on Tim's face and his metallic-rimmed sunglasses. The lenses reflect the clear blue sky and lush green trees of the surrounding park. He is seen walking along a paved road near a parking lot, carrying a black backpack over his shoulders. (3) Tim is shown inside a modern, brightly lit retail space, presenting white t-shirts featuring rainbow-colored logos. A visual filter is applied to the screen to simulate the color-enhancing effect of his sunglasses, comparing the view with and without the lenses. The camera captures him from various eye-level and slightly low angles as he continues his presentation.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們現在人呢. (3) [Slogan]: 蘋果總部. [Subtitle]: 蘋果總部. (4) [Subtitle]: 旁邊的遊客中心. (5) [Subtitle]: 剛參加完iPhone發表會. (6) [Subtitle]: 大家有沒有注意到. (7) [Subtitle]: 我今天戴什麼來. (8) [Variety]: (Timの時尚單品!). (9) [Subtitle]: 沒有錯, 就是Maui Jim的太陽眼鏡. (10) [Variety]: (一秒變潮男?!). [Slogan]: Maui Jim 太陽眼鏡. (11) [Subtitle]: 每次來庫比提諾. (12) [Subtitle]: 一定要戴上Maui Jim. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為這邊的陽光啊. (14) [Subtitle]: 實在是太強了. (15) [Subtitle]: 像蘋果發表會半戶外的場地. (16) [Subtitle]: 如果沒有戴那種偏光鏡. (17) [Subtitle]: 眼睛容易畏光. (18) [Variety]: 不舒服. [Subtitle]: 不舒服. (19) [Subtitle]: 最厲害就是鏡片啊. (20) [Subtitle]: 它擁有獨家的專利技術. (21) [Variety]: (PolarizedPlus2®技術). [Subtitle]: 消除眩光, 提升色彩飽和度. (22) [Subtitle]: 可以將色彩增強. (23) [Subtitle]: 降低光線同時. (24) [Variety]: (增強色彩對比: 強化紅光、綠光、藍光). (25) [Subtitle]: 依然保留真實色彩. (26) [Subtitle]: 我們進去蘋果訪客中心. (27) [Variety]: (來都來了). [Subtitle]: 就是要買限定商品. (28) [Subtitle]: 這裡限定T-shirt顏色是不是超級繽紛. (29) [Subtitle]: 戴上眼鏡看顏色的表現. (30) [Subtitle]: 跟原本顏色. [Variety]: 有戴Maui Jim 墨鏡. [Variety]: 沒戴Maui Jim 墨鏡. [Slogan]: 差不多~. (31) [Subtitle]: 不會像一般的墨鏡一樣. (32) [Subtitle]: 只會讓視覺畫面. [Slogan]: 直接暗掉. (33) [Subtitle]: 所有的鏡片啊. (34) [Subtitle]: 都能在消除眩光的時候呢. (35) [Subtitle]: 還可以同時保留真實色彩. (36) [Subtitle]: 我現在戴這副墨鏡啊. (37) [Subtitle]: 它鏡片阿貝值. [Variety]: (人眼阿貝值 45-50). [Slogan]: 高達56. [Variety]: 阿貝值: 阿貝值越高 色散越低 鏡片清晰度 越小、越清晰. (38) [Subtitle]: 代表色彩還原更好. (39) [Subtitle]: 看東西更自然清楚. (40) [Subtitle]: 戴比不戴更清晰. (41) [Subtitle]: 而且它配上日本製的鈦鏡框. (42) [Subtitle]: 針對亞洲人設計的版型. (43) [Subtitle]: 我戴起來其實... [Variety]: (蠻有個性的). [Slogan]: 蠻不錯的. (44) [Subtitle]: 很有個性吧. (45) [Subtitle]: 上次還被外籍空服說. [Variety]: 墨鏡被搭訕. (46) [Subtitle]: 墨鏡很好看. (47) [Subtitle]: 是不是很加分? (48) [Subtitle]: 我自己來加州. (49) [Subtitle]: 一定要帶它出門. (50) [Subtitle]: 因為這裡實在太曬了. (51) [Subtitle]: 你一定要保護你的眼睛才行. (52) [Subtitle]: 其實我最感的地方就是. (53) [Subtitle]: 我最近有在打高爾夫. (54) [Subtitle]: 球場很亮. (55) [Subtitle]: 小白球揮出去以後. (56) [Subtitle]: 戴上墨鏡以後找球更方便了. (57) [Subtitle]: 而且輕量化的設計. (58) [Subtitle]: 長期戴起來也非常舒服. (59) [Subtitle]: 下果嶺幾個小時都過去囉. (60) [Subtitle]: 舒適度對我還是非常重要. (61) [Subtitle]: 想要看更多的Maui Jim墨鏡資訊. (62) [Subtitle]: 看一下我們的資訊欄.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main character (Tim), 3 passers-by visible in background during various shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male wearing a light green t-shirt, a dark flat cap, metallic sunglasses, and a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features the Apple Park Visitor Center in Cupertino, characterized by its massive curved glass walls and minimalist architecture, surrounded by olive trees and sunny California streets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker with a high-energy, friendly voice begins speaking in Traditional Chinese with a fast speech rate. Underneath the vocals, a light, upbeat acoustic pop background track with a steady tempo and rhythmic guitar strumming is audible. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition between technical points. The speaker continues his narration, maintaining a consistent volume and positive emotional valence. There is a very low level of background ambient wind noise. (3) The audio continues with detailed descriptions from the speaker, whose pitch remains in a moderate conversational range with high variability. The music remains steady, providing a cohesive rhythmic bed for the narration. (4) A final 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a promotional point. The speaker delivers a closing statement and a call to action. The music swells briefly in volume before cutting out at the very end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Technical Features -> Lifestyle Application -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review for Maui Jim sunglasses, leveraging the high-interest context of an Apple event at the company's headquarters to demonstrate the product's color-enhancing lenses and comfort in high-glare environments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly mentions the brand name multiple times, demonstrates product features (Abbe value, polarized technology), and includes a call to action directing viewers to more information in the description box.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines a travel vlog aesthetic with a professional tech review, using the iconic Apple Park location to add authority and visual interest to the sunglasses promotion.
